body.input:
Assistant: STEP_OK

Assistant: WAKEUP_OK

User: [T6e-phase1 wakeUp-deadstream-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'dead-stream-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. You should receive a taskId (no imageUrl yet). End with STEP_OK if taskId is present, FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with WAKEUP_OK. If revived but imageUrl is missing or empty, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>.
